fields.label: Name
fields.description: Reference name; cited by transform_args.name on rules that use the 'computed' transformer.

fields.label: Output Type
fields.options:
Decimal
Int
String
Date
Datetime
Boolean
JSON

fields.label: Cache Per Record
fields.description: If checked, the expression evaluates once per record-level invocation instead of per access.

fields.label: Expression
fields.description: Sandboxed Python expression. Allowed names: source_doc, source_payload, get_path, sum_path, filter_path.
